content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/database.py:1	import sqlite32	3	def get_db_connection():4	    conn = sqlite3.connect('database.db')5	    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row6	    return conn7	8	def init_db():9	    conn = get_db_connection()10	    conn.execute('CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS urls (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, original_url TEXT NOT NULL, short_url TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE)')11	    conn.commit()12	    conn.close()13	14	if __name__ == '__main__':15	    init_db()
